changed.description: Refactor GitHub Actions workflows to pass context variables via env variables rather than command-line string interpolation

fixed.description: Increase release pipeline timeout from 60 to 120 minutes to prevent Autodoc and compose-artifacts from timing out during Gemini-powered documentation generation

security.description: Extract GitHub tokens and PATs into environment variables instead of inlining them in shell scripts to prevent credential exposure in logs or potential shell injection vulnerabilities
